title: Frequently Asked Questions
a1: 1💗1 is a platform that aims to create a better world through collaboration and consensus. The platform allows users to connect and create 'missions' - groups with shared skills and resources that work together to achieve goals and create value.
a2: Users of 1💗1 join "missions" with shared values, goals, and skills. Each mission works towards a specific goal through collaboration, open communication, and decision-making mechanisms based on consensus. Profits and revenues are managed transparently and shared among mission members according to their commitments and contributions.
a3: The 'Worldwide Freedom Charter' is a declaration calling for the rejection of violence and coercion as a means to resolve conflicts and promote interests. Signing this charter is a condition for joining the 1💗1 platform and symbolizes a commitment to conduct based on dialogue, mutual respect, and agreement.
q4: What is the purpose of the 'Agreement Map'?
a4: The 'Agreement Map' is a visual representation of all 1💗1 users who have signed the 'Worldwide Freedom Charter'. The map's purpose is to illustrate the scope of support for the idea of a world based on peace, cooperation, and mutual agreement.
q5: What are the benefits of joining 1💗1?
a5:
Joining 1💗1 opens a door to a world of new opportunities:
 Networking: An opportunity to meet people with similar interests and create fruitful collaborations.
 Self-fulfillment: An opportunity to contribute your skills and experience to a shared cause and receive recognition and fair compensation.
 Social impact: An opportunity to take an active part in creating a better world based on values of cooperation, empathy, and mutual respect.
q6: Is there a fee to use the 1💗1 platform?
a6: Participation in the 1💗1 platform does not involve a fixed fee. Mission members share revenues and profits according to their contribution and based on prior agreements.
q7: What tools and resources are available to users on the platform?
a7:
1💗1 provides a variety of tools and resources that aid in effective communication, project management, and decision-making:
 Decentralized digital ledger: For transparent management of shared funds and resources.
 Voting and negotiation system: To promote consensus-based decision-making processes.
 Project management tools: Such as graphs, Gantt charts, and task boards.
a8: To join the 1💗1 platform, you must agree to the 'Worldwide Consensus for Freedom'. After that, you can search for 'missions' that match your interests or initiate the establishment of a new 'mission' of your own.
q9: How are decisions made within the partnership?
a9: Every decision is made using a consensus-based voting system, with built-in negotiation tools that allow all partners to reach an agreement in a transparent and fair manner.
q10: How are profits shared between partners?
a10: The platform translates every contribution (time, resources, or investment) into ownership percentages and performs smart and automatic profit distribution according to the established agreements.
q11: Can new partners be added later?
a11: Yes. Partners can be added at any stage, while maintaining balance, transparency, and alignment with the existing agreements between all participants.
q12: How is daily work managed within the venture?
a12: The system includes smart chat, task management, Kanban boards, personal assignments, and graphic reports – ensuring all partners stay synchronized and focused.
q13: Can products or services be marketed through the platform?
a13: Yes. Every partnership can offer and market its products or services directly through the platform as part of the venture management.
